title: Heartsteal [ Official Modpack ]
description: A modpack aimed to recreate the feeling of the lifesteal smp while still adding many features that will benefit your mimecraft experience
body: This is a modpack aimed to replicate the feeling of the lifesteal smp. The modpack includes client and server side mods. It adds many pvp related mods to make sure you dominate your next fight. It also brings back string dupers, making grinding gear much easier, furthermore your fps will improve massively due to the prescence of the best performance mods.
